metadata.description: Pure-CPU, $0, read-only integrity-lock over EXISTING iter-4/5/8 experiment JSONs. Recomputes the 16k surgical selectivity and RE-FRAMES it strictly as a LOCALIZATION claim (denominator = the disowned DENSE-WHOLE-ABL strawman; the fair d_sub-gated dense control is equally/MORE surgical, so the surgical advantage disappears), and consolidates the settled spine under one canonical name with computed-vs-stored/carried cross-checks (never overwrite mismatches; report with notes).

inputs.carry_template: iter-8 integrity-lock eval (schema/template + carried numbers; not a formal dep)

cross_checks.name: A2.denominator_is_dense_whole_abl
cross_checks.computed: iter-4/5 'DENSE-ABL' (diff-of-means PARENT-direction erasure, h-=beta*(h.u)u, footprint_offtarget==1.0, broad unconditional projection) IS the DENSE-WHOLE-ABL operator (whole-parent over-shoot). The 1262x/1452x selectivity ratio's DENOMINATOR is therefore the strawman a later draft section disowns -- so the ratio is a LOCALIZATION statement, not an SAE-specific surgical advantage.
cross_checks.stored: iter-4/5 'DENSE-ABL' (diff-of-means PARENT-direction erasure, h-=beta*(h.u)u, footprint_offtarget==1.0, broad unconditional projection) IS the DENSE-WHOLE-ABL operator (whole-parent over-shoot). The 1262x/1452x selectivity ratio's DENOMINATOR is therefore the strawman a later draft section disowns -- so the ratio is a LOCALIZATION statement, not an SAE-specific surgical advantage.
cross_checks.note: verified on all 6 absorption cases; all DENSE-ABL footprint_offtarget==1.0; denom_ok=True

cross_checks.name: A4.65k_median_raw_reproduces_carried
cross_checks.note: RAW median over 8 absorption cases REPRODUCES the carried corrected median 676.3 EXACTLY (median is robust to the Georgia divide-by-eps outlier -- no floor needed).

cross_checks.name: A4.65k_corrected_selectivity_mean
cross_checks.note: INTEGRITY-LOCK 3-number report: stored_raw=466996.7 (divide-by-eps); computed_robust(eps=max(kg,1e-5))=828.5; carried_corrected=721.7. Recompute does NOT exactly reproduce 721.7 (carried lock used a different floor recipe); NOT overwritten. All corrections agree the raw 466997x is an artifact; Georgia-65k corrects from 3710589 to 3711x (comparable-order to 16k 1722x). PAPER must use ~722/676, never 466997x.
cross_checks.resolution: USE the corrected MEDIAN ~676x (RAW median 676.3 reproduces carried 676.3 exactly -- median is robust to the divide-by-eps outlier). The MEAN is floor-recipe-dependent: carried 721.7 vs robust-recompute 828; cite as '~700-830x' or prefer the median. NEVER cite the raw 466997x.

cross_checks.name: B1.distinct_holes
cross_checks.note: RECOMPUTE from kg_repair_loop: 24 DISTINCT (concept,subcontext) holes among the 30 FDR survivors; exactly 6 holes carry a 2nd surviving variant (kg_ktrack+kg_diagnostic): ['numeric/date', 'numeric/decimal', 'numeric/ordinal', 'taxonomic/Georgia', 'taxonomic/Jordan', 'taxonomic/United States']. Carried settled-spine figure is 22 (implied 8 second-variants). MISMATCH (+2) reported, NOT overwritten -- the source data authoritatively shows 24 distinct holes / 6 second-variants.
cross_checks.resolution: USE 24 distinct holes (source-authoritative recompute over the 30 FDR survivors; 6 carry a 2nd variant). The carried 22 (implying 8 second-variants) could not be reproduced from art_sxwT7hK6YFEA and appears to be a stale consolidation figure. Headline '30 FDR survivors across 3 families' is unaffected.

The carried 22 (implying 8 second-variants) could not be reproduced from art_sxwT7hK6YFEA and appears to be a stale consolidation figure. Headline '30 FDR survivors across 3 families' is unaffected.

cross_check_summary.note: n_passed = PASS (recompute matched) + CARRIED (carried-consistent). FINDINGS are documented carried-figure drifts surfaced by the lock (recompute authoritative; never overwritten). 0 unexpected failures.

paper_wording.W_selectivity_as_localization: The ~1262x median / 1452x mean selectivity means the KG-named absorber's ablation is LOCALIZED (near-zero collateral on sibling sub-contexts -- mean KG collateral 1.49e-4 -- and a tiny token footprint ~0.4%); it is NOT an SAE-specific surgical advantage, because the ratio's denominator is the unconditional whole-parent dense erasure (DENSE-WHOLE-ABL), which over-shoots by construction.
paper_wording.W_section56_reconciliation: Against the genuinely-fair d_sub-gated CONDITIONAL dense control the surgical advantage disappears (fair retain-collateral 2.8e-6 vs KG 5.1e-5 on 'large', with the FAIR-minus-KG collateral CI excluding 0 -- fair is significantly CLEANER); present 1262x strictly as LOCALIZATION and drop the whole-parent strawman from the surgical-advantage rhetoric.
paper_wording.W_section56_inconsistency_flag: FLAG: the prior draft was internally inconsistent -- Section 5 advertised 1262x selectivity computed against DENSE-WHOLE-ABL, while Section 6 disowned DENSE-WHOLE-ABL as a strawman. The selectivity denominator and the disowned operator are the SAME object; reconcile by reframing 1262x as localization.
paper_wording.W_operator_table: Six operators, defined once: (1) KG-ABL -- single named-absorber ablation gated by the latent's own sparse firing, ZERO labels, the label-free SAE handle (collateral 5.1e-5); (2) DENSE-SUB-ABL -- strongest UNGATED diff-of-means erasure of u_sub, the LEAD reference, needs labels (0.021); (3) DENSE-SUB-ABL-GATED-FAIR -- erase u_sub only where a precise logistic d_sub fires (beta<=1), the GENUINELY-FAIR conditional control, CLEANER than KG (2.8e-6); (4) DENSE-SUB-ABL-GATED-footprint -- iter-7 footprint-matched gate, DEMOTED, over-erases ~14x (0.295); (5) MAX-PRECISION -- single most-precise latent, set-cover discovery INERT for the edit, often the same latent as KG (== KG 5.1e-5); (6) DENSE-WHOLE-ABL -- whole-parent over-shoot, the disowned strawman and the iter-4/5 selectivity denominator (2.61).
paper_wording.W_canonical_name: Use one stable name throughout: 'label-free single-specialist localization' -- anchored recall-hole-guided precision selection of a single absorber latent that marginal attribution drops. Retire to the appendix/changelog the aliases: two-track CCRG, clustering, KG-ABL-as-method, M1''', selector-zoo M-labels (S-rec/S-prec/S-mag).
paper_wording.W_presentation_strip: (i) Present the corrected results AS the results; move all self-correction ('a prior version claimed...') to a brief changelog/limitations note. (ii) Use ONE stable name. (iii) Define the operators ONCE in the compact 6-operator table; move the selector-zoo and M-labels (S-rec/S-prec/S-mag/M1'''/...) to an appendix. (iv) Lead each section with its single takeaway sentence. (v) Strip the iteration/rebuttal scaffolding throughout.
paper_wording.W_65k_correction: Report 65k absorption selectivity as the corrected median ~676x (which the raw cases reproduce exactly, since the median is robust to Georgia's divide-by-epsilon inflation) or corrected mean ~722x; NEVER ship the raw 466997x, which is a divide-by-epsilon artifact (Georgia KG-collateral==0 -> ratio ~3.7e6).
paper_wording.W_numeric_below_gate: Numeric digit-token reconstruction cosine is 0.876 (65k) / 0.8911 (16k), both below the 0.9 editing gate, so numeric concepts are reported as 'numeric below-gate': their KG-repairs still survive FDR (15/65k, 10/16k), but the single-latent EDITING claim is not cleared for the numeric family.

metadata.distinct_holes_note: RECOMPUTE: 24 distinct (concept,subcontext) holes among 30 FDR survivors (6 carry a 2nd variant); carried settled-spine figure was 22 -> MISMATCH reported, not overwritten.
metadata.fdr_recompute_note: hand-rolled BH (alpha=0.05) -> 30 survivors; row-by-row match with stored=True; statsmodels agrees=True.
metadata.selectivity_65k_correction_note: raw stored mean=466996.7 (divide-by-eps); raw median=676.33 reproduces carried 676.3 EXACTLY; robust(eps=1e-5) mean=828.5; carried corrected 721.7/676.3.

formula: h -= lambda * z_l * W_dec[l]  (single named-absorber ablation) | gate: the latent's OWN sparse JumpReLU firing | label-cost: ZERO sub-context labels | role: the label-free SAE handle under test
examples.metadata_formula: h -= lambda * z_l * W_dec[l]  (single named-absorber ablation)
examples.metadata_gate: the latent's OWN sparse JumpReLU firing

examples.output: formula: h -= beta * (h . u_sub) u_sub  (everywhere; strongest UNGATED diff-of-means) | gate: none (unconditional) | label-cost: needs sub-context labels to fit u_sub | role: LEAD reference, NOT the fair control; KG beats this (footprint artifact)
examples.metadata_formula: h -= beta * (h . u_sub) u_sub  (everywhere; strongest UNGATED diff-of-means)
examples.metadata_label_cost: needs sub-context labels to fit u_sub

examples.output: formula: erase u_sub ONLY where a precise logistic d_sub detector fires, beta<=1 | gate: ONE unified logistic d_sub gate (balacc 0.96-1.00) | label-cost: needs sub-context labels for d_sub | role: GENUINELY-FAIR control; collateral 2.79e-6 CLEANER than KG -> closes the edit gap, adv_KGvsFAIR ~0 CI incl 0
examples.metadata_formula: erase u_sub ONLY where a precise logistic d_sub detector fires, beta<=1
